summary: Detailed feature-by-feature comparison between the uploaded flow diagram and the existing job_lead_search.py implementation. Covers 17 matching features, 4 features in diagram but not in code (Google Sheets, Sales Outreach, Structured Extraction AI as separate step, Company Growing meaning), and 10 features in code but not in diagram (Step 5 Remote filter, multiple data sources, AI modes, SQLite storage, etc.). Overall match is approximately 70-75%.
